free_text: Nuclear structure relevant to neutrinoless double
beta decay: The valence protons in 76Ge and 76Se
Ring Cyclotron at the Research Center
for Nuclear Physics (RCNP) facility at Osaka University
with the Grand Raiden spectrograph were used
Evaporated targets of 76Ge and 76Se were used
Grand Raiden magnetic spectrometer of the
multiwire drift chambers of vertical drift type
and two plastic scintillation detectors 1 cm thick.
For polarization measurements a focal plane
polarimeter was placed downstream of the focal plane
detectors. It consisted of four multiwire proportional
chambers, plastic scintillator, carbon slab and a
plastic scintillator hodoscope. A carbon slab 7-9 cm
thick was used as polarization analyzer.
